title: Add Monaco 2025 special rule debt
summary: The 2025 FIA sporting regulations made Monaco different: drivers had to use at least three tyre sets, unlike the usual two dry-compound requirement.
rationale: The 2025 FIA sporting regulations made Monaco different: drivers had to use at least three tyre sets, unlike the usual two dry-compound requirement. Current stop-debt features that assume one required stop can under-rank the second mandatory Monaco stop.
implementation_hint: Create Monaco2025 flag and set required_stop_count/required_tyre_sets higher for Race == Monaco Grand Prix and Year == 2025. Add StopDebtToRule, LateRace_MonacoDebt, and RuleDebtAfterCurrent interactions with PitCountAfterCurrent and LapsRemaining_Est.
expected_effect: Localized but clean lift on Monaco 2025 rows and better generalization than generic tyre-life thresholds.
risk: If Race names omit Monaco or the competition data abstracts rules away, this becomes a sparse feature with little impact.
